text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's fall, and El Condor Pasa's friends, Special
Week and Grass Wonder, have grown
significantly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them put on a special event for their
fans, including a concert, and then El Condor
Pasa challenges the other two in the talk show
afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's decided that El Condor Pasa will face off
against Special Week in the Japan Cup and Grass
Wonder in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All three runners are determined to deliver
incredible performances for the audience.
